headline: RCEP Trade Benefits Reach RM48 Billion for Malaysia
context: RCEP generated RM48 billion in additional trade in its third full year with electronics and palm oil leading benefits.

cards.big: RCEP generated RM48 billion in additional Malaysian trade in 2025
cards.sub: World largest trade bloc benefits concentrate in electronics and palm oil

cards.big: Electronics exports to RCEP members grew 22% to RM185 billion in 2025
cards.sub: China Japan and South Korea were top 3 destinations

cards.big: Palm oil exports saved RM2.8 billion in reduced tariffs across markets
cards.sub: India tariff reduction from 40% to 25% opened significant new demand

cards.big: SME utilization of RCEP preferential tariffs was only 28% in 2025
cards.sub: Complex rules of origin deter smaller businesses from claiming benefits

cards.big: RCEP utilization tests whether trade agreements benefit large firms or the entire economy
RM48 billion RCEP benefits — but gains concentrate in sectors that were already globally competitive.
